case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. SHANIQE LAFRANCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAFRANCE, SHANIQE $3,071.45 PRINCIPAL, $317.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,388.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100129207)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100129207) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200005400), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. SERVED JAN-11-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAFRANCE, SHANIQE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $317.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100129207) AS TO DEFENDANT LAFRANCE, SHANIQE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-28-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 74757746) FILED BY ATTORNEY BEYER, CHRISTOPHER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 CONTINUED TO JUN-29-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
